text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One weekend, Gold Ship shows up out of
nowhere and drags me to the movie theater.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We happen to run into Mejiro McQueen while
we're there.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hiii-de-ho! To which movie shall we go? I'll give
you 10,800 seconds to decide, so think fast!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I should hope deciding won't take us three
hours... And would you please keep your voice
down?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Trainer, but might you purchase some
popcorn? The largest size they have, if you
please.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That ought to keep Gold Ship preoccupied until
the film is over.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You know it! We watch movies together all the
time. Mac loves me so much, she just can't stay
away! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I can't stay away? You're the one who keeps sneaking up on me unannounced!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Why, just last time you appeared out of nowhere
in the empty seat beside me! I nearly shrieked!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, McQueen, you can't do that! Every movie
lover has to follow the golden rule:

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: No noise until the credits roll!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Argh, you are impossible!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Anyways, we'd better pick a flick!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: We've got the heartwarming sports movie, Shape Up, Ebisu High! Or the pulse-pounding action romp, JAM: The Last Cartridge! What'll it be?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
An athlete's coming-of-age story or an
adrenaline-laced thrill ride? H-how can we ever
decide?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Wanna see both, do you? But you can't have your
cake and eat it too! Well, not unless you've
mastered the shadow clone jutsu, like me.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Okay, your call, Trainer. What'll it be?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The three of us have a blast watching Shape Up, Ebisu High.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The story of a ragtag sumo club's climb from the
bottom of the barrel to the top of the league gets
us all inspired.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Why, that was marvelous!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Especially when the main character beat that instructor... He started out a lazy glutton, but he grew so much... Sniff...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oho? Are those tears I spy, McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: O-of course not! I'm not crying!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm a proud Umamusume of the Mejiro family! I
would never be so improper as t—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Bah! Mejiro schmejiro. If you wanna let it out, let
it out!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You felt it too, right? Didn't it pluck at your
heartstrings every time the hero got back up?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Those moments that bring a tear to the eye...
That's what it's all about! A life without that
would be a snoozefest!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Gold Ship...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...You're right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I admit it! That movie touched me to the core! I... I was deeply moved! ...Sniffle.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's perfect! Very nice! Now, look right into the
camera!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: How dare you! Turn that off right this instant!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Bwahahaha! Gotta run! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What nerve!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I swear, I don't know why I put up with her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The three of us have a blast watching JAM: The Last Cartridge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The nonstop thrills have our palms sweating, and
the over-the-top action keeps us on the edge of
our seats from start to finish.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Pant... Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I... can't... take it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Erm... Gold Ship? Pardon me, but you seem to be
breathing rather heavily.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That leap from the forty-eighth story! That midair
throwing knife kick! That sick skateboard grind
down the roller coaster!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: GAAAH! I'm so fired up! Action movies rock!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Shhh! Please! Keep your voice down!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: LET'S GOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: G-Gold Ship?! Hey! Come back here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no telling what an adrenaline-fueled Gold
Ship might do! Mejiro McQueen and I race after
her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship! Oh, where in the world has she run off
to?

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Eeek! Thief! That man stole my purse! Somebody
stop him!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huh?! A thief?!

text_block_list.name: Thief
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Hey, you! Outta my way!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Never fear! Action hero Golshi is here, fresh off a
training course that spanned twenty star systems!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: YOU SHALL NOT PASS! HI-YAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wha-Pow!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it... You knocked him flat on his
back. There really is no stopping you sometimes...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Now that blew the cobwebs away! Action
movies are awesome!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship grins from ear to ear as the onlookers
applaud her skills.
